### Gotchas

- [CLEAN] Cross-project memory isolation: sub-projects under framework root are separate git repos. Each has its own AGENTS.md. Learnings from one sub-project do NOT auto-replicate to another without multi-seat mode merging them into the shared parent AGENTS.md.  ← [auto, 20260625_031700_framework]

### Patterns & Conventions

- [CLEAN] Multi-seat mode activation: touch .hermes/MULTI_SEAT at framework root. project-memex auto-detects the flag and writes to .hermes/session_logs/<uuid>.json instead of patching AGENTS.md directly.  ← [auto, 20260625_031700_framework]
- [CLEAN] Merge pipeline operational cadence: run python .hermes/merge_sessions.py weekly (Phase 1) to detect conflicts. Resolve divergent entries in CONFLICT_REVIEW_RESOLVED.md. Run --resolve (Phase 2) to output AGENTS.md patch. Apply patch, archive session logs, commit.  ← [auto, 20260625_031700_framework]
- [CLEAN] merge_sessions.py winner rule: when auto-merging consensus entries, [CLEAN] takes priority over [WORKAROUND]. [CLEAN] entries are confirmed across sessions and intentionally designed. [WORKAROUND] entries are provisional symptom-fixes — never promote them as canonical.  ← [auto, 20260625_031700_framework]
